text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 167 

PASS_THRU_AMT 

LABEL: Pass Thru Per Diem Amount for Stay ($) 

DESCRIPTION: The total of all claim pass through per diem amounts (rounded to whole dollars) for the stay. 

SHORT NAME: PASSTHRU 

LONG NAME: PASS_THRU_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by multiplying the pass thru per diem amount that is present on the last claim
